top_signals.title: BP cuts net debt after Iran war drives oil price surge
top_signals.summary: Higher prices help cut borrowing as oil major tries to show financial discipline under new boss
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Iran Sneaks 12 Million Barrels Past Renewed U.S. Oil Blockade
top_signals.summary: Iran is estimated to have sneaked supertankers with a total of 12 million barrels of crude oil in the week between the end of the U.S. waiver on Iranian oil sales on July 7 and July 14, just as the U.S. announced the renewed blockade on Iranian ports and oil cargoes.   Last Tuesday, July 7, Iranian attacks on three commercial vessels in the Strait of Hormuz prompted an immediate U.S. reaction, with the U.S military striking multiple targets in Iran and the Treasury canceling the waiver on Iran’s oil sales that was supposed to be…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Federal Reserve Board requests comment on a proposal to amend its requirements for banks to maintain anti-money laundering programs
top_signals.summary: Federal Reserve Board requests comment on a proposal to amend its requirements for banks to maintain anti-money laundering programs
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Minutes of the Money Market Committee meeting – June 2026
top_signals.summary: The Money Markets Committee is a forum for market participants and authorities to discuss the UK unsecured deposits and funding market and securities lending and repo markets.

top_signals.title: Kyoto District Court rejects suit seeking halt of Oi nuclear plant
top_signals.summary: The plaintiffs had argued the risks related to the stability of the nuclear plant's foundations were underestimated and that evacuation plans were flawed.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Decentralized AI project Nous Research in talks to raise $75M at $1.5B valuation: report
top_signals.summary: Nous Research is raising at least $75 million led by Robot Ventures at a $1.5 billion valuation, per TechCrunch.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: GABLER, FLANQ Complete Successful Sea Acceptance Test for USV
top_signals.summary: GABLER, a provider of submarine systems, and German defense technology company FLANQ have successfully completed the Sea Acceptance Test (SAT) demonstrating seaworthiness of their jointly developed Torpedo-Tube-Launched Uncrewed Surface Vessel…

top_signals.title: Japan's largest taxi operator shuts systems after cyberattack
top_signals.summary: Japan's largest taxi operator, Nihon Kotsu, announced that its systems were compromised in a cyberattack, forcing the company to shut down part of its infrastructure. [...]
